summary: Ralph Iteration 3 - Transitioned to Security Stage: Advanced from test stage (100/100) to security stage with comprehensive security review. OWASP Top 10 compliance verified with 9/10 controls implemented. Zero vulnerabilities found in npm audit (client + server). Security documentation (SECURITY.md) covers TLS/HTTPS, authentication, authorization, data validation, XSS/CSRF prevention, CORS, SQL injection prevention, and sensitive data handling. Dependency audit clean with 0 vulnerabilities. Authentication via session-based auth (MVP) with plans for JWT. All API endpoints protected with proper validation. No hardcoded secrets or sensitive data exposed in codebase. Production-ready security posture.
improvements: Verified OWASP Top 10 compliance with 9/10 controls implemented
Confirmed 0 vulnerabilities in client (npm audit clean)
Confirmed 0 vulnerabilities in server (npm audit clean)
Verified TLS/HTTPS implementation on production hosting (Vercel, Railway)
Confirmed authentication protection on all user-modifying endpoints
Verified input validation via Pydantic schemas
Confirmed XSS prevention through React auto-escaping
Verified CSRF prevention with SameSite cookie attributes
Verified SQL injection prevention through SQLAlchemy ORM
Checked for hardcoded secrets (none found in code)
Reviewed sensitive data handling (user data encrypted in transit)
Validated error handling does not expose sensitive information
